Usage: gaia [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

 Gaia вЂ” knowledge package authoring toolkit.

в•­в”Ђ Options в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•®
в”‚ --install-completion          Install completion for the current shell.      в”‚
в”‚ --show-completion             Show completion for the current shell, to copy в”‚
в”‚                               it or customize the installation.              в”‚
в”‚ --help                        Show this message and exit.                    в”‚

в•­в”Ђ Commands в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•®
в”‚ add             Install a registered Gaia knowledge package.                 в”‚
в”‚ compile         Compile a knowledge package to .gaia/ir.json.                в”‚
в”‚ check           Validate structure and artifact consistency for a Gaia       в”‚
в”‚                 knowledge package.                                           в”‚
в”‚ infer           Run BP inference on a compiled knowledge package.            в”‚
в”‚ init            Create a new Gaia knowledge package.                         в”‚
в”‚ register        Prepare or submit a registration for a tagged GitHub-backed  в”‚
в”‚                 Gaia package.                                                в”‚
в”‚ render          Render presentation outputs from a compiled package.         в”‚
в”‚ starmap         Emit a starmap of the compiled package.                      в”‚
в”‚ starmap-replay  Emit an HTML replay of a package's lkm-discovery run.        в”‚
в”‚ inquiry         Gaia Inquiry вЂ” semantic review loop.                         в”‚
в”‚ trace           Gaia ARM Trace вЂ” verify and review execution traces.         в”‚
